titleStmt.title: SII 38.183: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 183. (A.R. No. 183 of 1912.) TIRUVOṞṞIYŪR, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On a slab built into the floor of the maṇḍapa infront of the central shrine Ādhipurīśvara temple.

summary.p: Records that the trustees of the temple at Tiruvoṟṟiyūr fixed the responsibility for the performances of worship in the morning and evening, and also to carry out the repair and renovation of the Tyagarājasvāmi shrine at Tiruvoṟṟiyūr, a taṉiyūr in Puḻal-kōṭṭam, on certain Ulliveṅgi Pēśi Cheṭṭiyār. The ceremony of conferment was made in the presence of Ṟāsāśrī Muttambi Mudaliyār, an official incharge of the seal (mudiraikku-adhikāri) of Hajjarat Duwāvadu Khan, and also the official madhyastha, Pettu Nāyakkā (a native) of Koḍiṅgaiyūr. Kāḷatti Gurukkaḷ and Oṟṟiyappa Gurukkaḷ figure as signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
vekutāṉṉiya » tai mātam 7 nāḷ puḻal
kkoṭṭattil taṉiyūr tiruoṟṟiyūr tiyā
kaṟāya cuvāmiyārkovil tiruppaṇi mu
talākiya taṟma(m)ñ ceyya veṇṭi śrī
hajarattuvāvatukhān muttiraikku A
tikāriyākiya ṟāca śrī muttampimutaliyār
mattiyastam koṭuṅkaiyūr pettuṉāya
kkar yivarkaḷ muṉpāka Ulli veṅki
peci ceṭṭiyārkku satāṉattārom nic
ciyittapaṭi tiruoṟṟiyūrkovilile
kālacanti Upayamum mattumuḷḷa tiruppaṇi
mutalākiya kaṟ(m)maṅkaḷuñ ceyitukoṇ
ṭu tāṅkaḷ taṟmmaparipālaṉam paṇṇi
k kaṭavārkaḷākavum yintappaṭikku 2 100
Āyiraṅ kāttāṉ Eḻuttu vaḷḷiya
ppa kurukkaḷ kaieḻuttu kāḷattikurukkaḷ
kaieḻuttu Oṟṟiyappakurukkaḷ kaieḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 38.183 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
